seoTitle: Dolphin Sands vs Don — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Dolphin Sands vs Don: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dolphin Sands and Don.
heading: Dolphin Sands vs Don — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dolphin Sands, Tasmania and Don, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dolphin Sands has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Don (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dolphin Sands or Don safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dolphin Sands has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Don scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dolphin Sands scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Don scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dolphin Sands or Don?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dolphin Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
